error_patterns.description_cn: 逐字直译：机械地将中文字词逐个翻译成英语，忽视英语语序和搭配

typical_examples.correct: Study hard and make progress every day.
There were huge crowds of people.

error_patterns.suggested_fix_strategy: 理解中文意思后用英语重新组织表达，不要对照中文词序

error_patterns.description_cn: 选词不当：使用不准确的英语词汇对应中文语义

typical_examples.correct: The price is high. / It is expensive.
typical_examples.note_cn: price 不能用 expensive 修饰

typical_examples.correct: I have things to attend to.

error_patterns.suggested_fix_strategy: 积累常用搭配，如 price + high/low，population + large/small

error_patterns.description_cn: 被动语态误用：中文被动结构不明显，翻译时忽视英语被动需求

typical_examples.incorrect: The book can borrow from the library.
typical_examples.correct: The book can be borrowed from the library.

typical_examples.incorrect: It is said he is rich.
typical_examples.correct: He is said to be rich.

error_patterns.suggested_fix_strategy: 分析中文原句的主宾关系，判断是否需要被动语态

error_patterns.description_cn: 句式单一：全部使用简单句，不会使用复合句或从句

typical_examples.incorrect: I like reading. Reading makes me happy.
typical_examples.correct: I like reading because it makes me happy.

typical_examples.incorrect: She is a girl. She studies hard.
typical_examples.correct: She is a girl who studies hard.

error_patterns.suggested_fix_strategy: 练习使用连词 and/but/because/which/who 连接短句
